AC-SMOKE-1.requirement: VER can register a passing AC in execute mode and persist it to the verification registry for later regression checks

verification.command: invoke harness_verify_register and harness_verify_list in execute mode
verification.description: Smoke validation of verification-registry plumbing: register one AC entry in execute mode, relying on the extension to create .harness/verification-registry.json if absent, then confirm listing can return cumulative entries.
